title: Phillis Wheatley and the Words of Liberty
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Phillis Wheatley was brought to Boston in bondage and became one of the most remarkable poets of the Revolutionary era. This factual narrative follows her life, her writing, her meeting with fame, and the hard limits the new nation placed around freedom.

chapters.title: A Child Taken Across the Atlantic
Learning to Read, Learning to Write
A Poet in a Revolutionary City
Fame, Freedom, and the Limits of a New Nation
